raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context and priorities","name":"What feels most important to get into today, Tom?","description":"Lets Tom set the agenda before the feedback lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal impact evidence","name":"What have you done recently that best shows Principal-level leverage on this team?","description":"Surfaces concrete examples of visible leverage rather than steady execution.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Visible leverage","name":"Where has your work changed the shape of a decision or a result this quarter?","description":"Looks for outcomes that go beyond task completion into team-level impact.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope on this team","name":"What does Principal scope mean to you on this team?","description":"Checks whether he has an explicit model of the role in the new context.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Old assumptions","name":"What assumptions from your last team are you still carrying here?","description":"Tests whether old operating patterns are shaping current behaviour.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Question-asking pattern","name":"What makes you hold back from asking questions early?","description":"Explores whether low question volume is confidence, habit, or a working style issue.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Judgment under ambiguity","name":"When a call is unclear, how do you decide whether to push ahead or escalate?","description":"Surfaces his decision rule for ambiguity and escalation.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team trust","name":"What have you done to build trust with people outside your immediate team?","description":"Checks whether he is actively creating trust across boundaries or staying within his lane.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation alignment","name":"What do you do before work starts to make sure expectations are aligned?","description":"Probes the habits that prevent avoidable drift and rework.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next behavior change","name":"What is the first change you want to make before our next check-in?","description":"Closes on one concrete behaviour shift with a near-term commitment.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
